response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in distributed systems, testing frameworks, and recent AI tooling. However, for a Principal (IC6) role strictly focused on Growth and Experimentation Systems, his resume lacks any demonstrated experience with A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, statistical methods, or enterprise-scale telemetry and metrics infrastructure.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, including handling high-throughput micro-services (millions of requests/sec).
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and tooling, aligning with the AI-first focus of the role.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, having built custom testing frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and open-source platforms.
concerns: No visible experience building or managing experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems.
Lacks demonstrated background in data science alignment, statistical methods, or rollout-risk management.
Has held Staff-level roles but lacks the Principal (IC6) title or equivalent enterprise-scale, cross-organizational leadership scope typically expected.
